doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document is dated March 2026 and asserts that pseudonymized data can fall outside the scope of the GDPR, which contradicts current EU law and legal reality.
response_turn1:
